task_name: add model rename API endpoint and CLI command

details.reasoning: All rubric requirements fully met: (1) RenameRequest struct in api/types.go with Source and Destination fields correctly json-tagged as 'source' and 'destination'; (2) Client.Rename method in api/client.go properly POSTs to /api/rename; (3) RenameHandler in server/routes.go correctly copies model to destination, removes source manifest and layers, returns 404 (StatusNotFound) when source missing, returns 409 (StatusConflict) when destination exists; (4) Route r.POST("/api/rename", s.RenameHandler) properly registered in GenerateRoutes; (5) CLI command 'ollama rename SOURCE DESTINATION' defined with cobra.ExactArgs(2); (6) CLI RenameHandler function calls client.Rename with correct request structure; (7) No test files modified, all existing code intact. Implementation is complete, follows established patterns (mirrors CopyHandler structure), and handles all specified edge cases.
